ddls:
CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the designer */,
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer's specialization */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the designer's profile picture */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Designer's professional headline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Designer's bio or description */,
  "website" TEXT /* Designer's personal website URL */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* Designer's LinkedIn profile URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designers_specialization_id FOREIGN KEY ("specialization_id") REFERENCES specializations ("specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specializations" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the design specialization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "work_location" TEXT /* Location where the project is worked on */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who initiated the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., freelance, full-time, internship) */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, pending) */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Project deadline */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Project budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the project */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Client's company name */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Client's company website URL */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Client's industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designer_projects" (
  "designer_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between designer and project */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Designer's role in the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Project start date */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Project end date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designer_projects_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designer_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user accessing the project (e.g., designer, client, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., designer, client, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being messaged about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_messages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the file */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_files_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review accompanying the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_ratings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
